name: Kinea High Yield Cri Fundo Investimento Imobiliario FII
summary: Kinea High Yield Cri Fundo Investimento Imobiliario FII is a real estate investment fund that invests primarily in Certificados de Recebíveis Imobiliários (CRIs), which are Brazilian real estate receivables certificates, aiming to generate high yield income for its investors. The fund's strategy involves selecting CRIs with attractive risk-adjusted returns, contributing to its goal of delivering consistent dividends. Its headquarter is located in Brazil.
